text.message: Guys, I don't think you want to feed black the port
I need that wood b ack
I have brick to trade now
blue let me know what you need to try and settle
Don't let the others get too far ahead
end your war of attrition please
I'm in last here and get robbed twice now back to back
i need a lot of help
But I need the wood back
I can give wood for wheat
I'm sure black hits me again though
Why the F did you mke that trade?
I won't rob you the rest of the game...
im sorry blue, id dint expect he had a RB
what do you expect - you challenge me for the port, call me out on chat, tell everyone not to trade with me, am I supposed to just roll over and let you have it?
I don't actually blame you black
I can plow him back blue if thats what you want
I blame ther other guys for trading you
I traded for city, I didnt know he had road building
because I knew he couldn't have settled otherwise
it was a reasonable move, oj.  it was low probability that I had rb.
Black will now have double wheat and triple ore
You won't be able to beat him
You wanted me getting that spot
To keep him from the port
I need a sheep and I can plow black
Black, I don't think they're gonna give it
meanwhile I think orange is winning this game.
I'll tell you what...you arn't gonna win it
No way I'm letting the guy who plowed me twice to win
